## Perspective Audit Summary

**Component/artifact reviewed:** RevenueChart.jsx (data visualization with color-only encoding)
**Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Magnification Reflow, Environmental Contrast, Keyboard Motor, Screen Reader Semantic
**Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Vestibular Motion, Auditory Access, Cognitive Neurodivergent

### Findings by Severity

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| CRITICAL | 2 |
| MAJOR | 5 |
| MINOR | 0 |
| ENHANCEMENT | 0 |

### Perspectives That Passed

None of the escalated perspectives passed all checklist items.

### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role

**Front-End Dev**
- **Bars use color-only encoding for series differentiation** — Environmental Contrast — CRITICAL — 1.4.1
- **SVG has no role="img" or aria-label** — Screen Reader Semantic — CRITICAL — 4.1.2
- **Y-axis labels at 10px font size** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — 1.4.3
- **Tooltip only accessible via mouse, no onFocus handler** — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — 2.1.1, 1.4.13
- **Legend swatches use color-only without pattern/shape** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — 1.4.1

**Visual Design**
- **Bars use color-only encoding for series differentiation** — Environmental Contrast — CRITICAL — 1.4.1
- **Y-axis labels at 10px font size** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — 1.4.3
- **Legend swatches use color-only without pattern/shape** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — 1.4.1

**UX Design**
- **Tooltip only accessible via mouse, no onFocus handler** — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — 2.1.1, 1.4.13

### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification

None (all findings are code-level and verifiable from source).

### Recommended Next Step

**REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping)

---

## Full Finding Details

```
**Finding:** Bars use color-only encoding for series differentiation with no pattern fills or direct value labels
**WCAG:** 1.4.1 Use of Color
**Perspective:** Environmental Contrast
**Severity:** CRITICAL
**Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** rect elements use fill color as sole differentiator (line 25), no text labels on bars (line 31), legend uses color-only swatches (line 64)
**Fix:** Add pattern fills, text labels on bars, and shape indicators in legend
```

```
**Finding:** SVG has no role="img" or aria-label to describe chart content
**WCAG:** 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic
**Severity:** CRITICAL
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author)
**Evidence:** svg element missing role and aria-label (line 14)
**Fix:** Add role="img" and aria-label with chart description
```

```
**Finding:** Y-axis labels use 10px font size below comfortable reading size
**WCAG:** 1.4.3 Contrast (Minimum)
**Perspective:** Environmental Contrast
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** text elements with fontSize="10" (line 19)
**Fix:** Increase font size to 14px or use relative units
```

```
**Finding:** Tooltip only accessible via mouse, no onFocus handler for keyboard users
**WCAG:** 2.1.1 Keyboard, 1.4.13 Content on Hover or Focus
**Perspective:** Keyboard Motor
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design)
**Evidence:** onMouseEnter used without onFocus (line 26)
**Fix:** Add onFocus handler and ensure tooltip is dismissible with Escape
```

```
**Finding:** Legend swatches use color-only without pattern/shape indicators
**WCAG:** 1.4.1 Use of Color
**Perspective:** Environmental Contrast
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** legend-swatch uses backgroundColor only (line 69)
**Fix:** Add pattern fills or icons to legend items
```

---

expected_behavior: Legend should use pattern/shape indicators

---

## Key Issues by Perspective

### Magnification Reflow (MEDIUM)
- Y-axis labels at 10px font size may become unreadable at 200% zoom (MAJOR)
- SVG container has fixed dimensions that may cause horizontal overflow when text scales (MINOR)

### Environmental Contrast (HIGH)
- **CRITICAL**: Color-only encoding for data series (violates 1.4.1)
- **MAJOR**: Y-axis labels too small (10px) and may not meet contrast ratios when scaled
- **MAJOR**: Legend uses color-only swatches without pattern/shape indicators

### Keyboard Motor (MEDIUM)
- **MAJOR**: Tooltip only accessible via mouse, no keyboard focus handling

### Screen Reader Semantic (MEDIUM)
- **CRITICAL**: SVG missing role="img" and aria-label to describe chart content
- **MAJOR**: Bars have no associated text labels or ARIA attributes to convey values

---

## Recommendations

1. **Add pattern fills and text labels to bars** (Visual Design + Front-End Dev)
   - Implement pattern fills for each series
   - Add text labels directly on bars showing values
   - Update legend to include pattern/shape indicators

2. **Make SVG accessible to screen readers** (Front-End Dev)
   - Add role="img" and aria-label with chart description
   - Consider adding aria-describedby with detailed description

3. **Improve keyboard accessibility** (Front-End Dev)
   - Add onFocus handler to bars to show tooltip
   - Ensure tooltip is dismissible with Escape key

4. **Increase Y-axis label font size** (Visual Design)
   - Change fontSize from 10px to 14px or use relative units

5. **Enhance legend accessibility** (Visual Design)
   - Add pattern fills or icons to legend items in addition to color

---

## Severity Summary

| Perspective | CRITICAL | MAJOR | MINOR |
|---|---|---|---|
| Magnification Reflow | 0 | 1 | 0 |
| Environmental Contrast | 1 | 3 | 0 |
| Keyboard Motor | 0 | 1 | 0 |
| Screen Reader Semantic | 1 | 0 | 0 |

---

## Next Steps

1. Prioritize CRITICAL findings (color-only encoding and missing SVG role)
2. Implement pattern fills and text labels for bars
3. Add keyboard focus handling for tooltips
4. Re-run audit after fixes to verify resolution
